item.title: Der große Trade-Republic-Irrtum und 2 ETFs für penible Anleger
item.author: Welt.de
item.description: Broadcom, TSMC, SK Hynix, Arista Networks, Tesla, Crispr Therapeutics, Tempus AI, Xtrackers Global Equity Top Active (WKN: DBX1TA), Xtrackers Global Growth Leaders (WKN: DBX1GL), iShares MSCI ACWI ETF (WKN: A1JMDF), JPMorgan Global Research Enhanced Index Equity (WKN: A2DWM6), iShares Core MSCI World ETF (WKN: A0RPWH) und ARK Innovation (WKN: A408AW).
